top_signals.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
top_signals.summary: Oil extended gains after President Donald Trump played down the prospect of near-term talks with Iran while threatening broader strikes, as risks to global supply spread beyond the Middle East to the Black Sea.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wistron shares surge in Taiwan after opening of Texas AI superchip plant to supply Nvidia
top_signals.summary: Taiwan’s Wistron Corporation opens first U.S. facility in Fort Worth, Texas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump reinstates direct US flights to Lebanon after meeting its president
top_signals.summary: US leader declines to put a timeline on an Israeli withdrawal from the Middle East nation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The US has collected about $13bn of Venezuela’s oil money. Where is it?
top_signals.summary: Washington has given diverging accounts of where the earthquake-shattered country’s funds are going
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Insurers cut prices in hunt for new oil and gas business
top_signals.summary: Projects in safe regions become more highly prized and send premiums down as competition rises
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Fed rang the alarm about Anthropic's Mythos AI model — but had to go months without it
top_signals.summary: The central bank didn't have access to Claude Mythos Preview as of mid-July, even as other institutions were racing to patch their vulnerabilities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Royal Mint Trading Fund: framework document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the Royal Mint Trading Fund, the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
